name: Tiramisu#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cake across the middle to form 2 halves.
2. Blend the coffee and kahlua together.
3. Sprinkle the one half of the cake with the coffee and kahlua mix, ensuring it is strongly flavored but not saturated enough to prevent collapse.
4. Mix the cream cheese and powdered sugar until light and spreadable.
5. Spread this mixture over the first half of the cake in a fairly thick layer.
6. Place the second half on top of the first.
7. Repeat steps 3-5 with the remaining ingredients.
8. Coat the top layer of cream cheese completely with cocoa powder using a wire strainer.
9. Refrigerate the cake for at least 2 hours before serving.
10. Optionally, substitute Kahlua with your favorite liqueur, rum, or brandy.
